name: EasyPost
description: Shipping API for address verification, shipment creation, label generation, tracking, insurance, and batch processing across USPS, UPS, FedEx, DHL, and more.

capabilities.name: addresses_create
capabilities.description: Create a new address object.

capabilities.name: addresses_create_and_verify
capabilities.description: Create and verify an address in a single request.

capabilities.name: addresses_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all addresses with pagination.

capabilities.name: addresses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an address by ID.

capabilities.name: addresses_verify
capabilities.description: Verify an existing address by ID.

capabilities.name: parcels_create
capabilities.description: Create a parcel with dimensions and weight.

capabilities.name: parcels_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a parcel by ID.

capabilities.name: shipments_create
capabilities.description: Create a shipment with addresses and parcel, automatically generating rates.

capabilities.name: shipments_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all shipments with pagination and date filters.

capabilities.name: shipments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific shipment by ID.

capabilities.name: shipments_buy
capabilities.description: Purchase a shipment with a selected rate to generate a label.

capabilities.name: shipments_label
capabilities.description: Convert a purchased label to a different format.

capabilities.name: trackers_create
capabilities.description: Create a tracker for a package.

capabilities.name: trackers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all trackers with pagination.

capabilities.name: trackers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a tracker by ID.

capabilities.name: insurance_create
capabilities.description: Create standalone insurance for a shipment.

capabilities.name: insurance_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all insurance records with pagination.

capabilities.name: insurance_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve insurance details by ID.

capabilities.name: insurance_refund
capabilities.description: Refund eligible standalone insurance.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Create refunds for one or more shipments.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all refunds with pagination.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a refund by ID.

capabilities.name: batches_create
capabilities.description: Create a new batch for bulk shipment processing.

capabilities.name: batches_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all batches with pagination.

capabilities.name: batches_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a batch by ID.

capabilities.name: batches_add_shipments
capabilities.description: Add shipments to an existing batch.

capabilities.name: batches_remove_shipments
capabilities.description: Remove shipments from a batch.

capabilities.name: batches_buy
capabilities.description: Purchase postage for all shipments in a batch.

capabilities.name: batches_label
capabilities.description: Generate a consolidated label file for all batch shipments.

capabilities.name: batches_scan_form
capabilities.description: Create a scan form for a batch.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a webhook endpoint for event notifications.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all webhooks.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a webhook by ID.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update a webhook's URL, secret, or headers.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.
